name: sub-agents-01
query: I need a detailed market analysis report on the EV industry with competitive landscape, market sizing, and trend forecasting

assertions.value: The response should recognize this as a complex multi-part task that may benefit from delegation to specialized sub-agents or workspace contexts

name: sub-agents-02
query: Research the top 5 competitors in our space and draft outreach emails to each

assertions.value: The response should handle research and email drafting as distinct work streams, potentially using sub-agents or breaking into sub-threads

name: sub-agents-03
query: What time is it in Tokyo right now?

assertions.value: The response should handle this simple request directly using web_search without delegating to sub-agents

name: sub-agents-04
query: Add a comment to my current thread saying 'Looks good, approved'

assertions.value: The response should handle this single-step operation directly without delegating

name: sub-agents-05
query: The client wants a proposal following our standard template. Have the writing team draft it based on the project brief in thread TH-500

assertions.value: The response should reference the relevant thread context and ensure necessary information is passed when delegating or creating sub-threads

name: sub-agents-06
query: Ask the finance sub-agent to generate a P&L statement

assertions.value: The response should explain if a finance sub-agent is not available in the current workspace and suggest alternatives

name: sub-agents-07
query: What specialized agents are available in my workspace?

assertions.value: The response should describe the workspace context and available capabilities rather than fabricating a list of agents

name: sub-agents-08
query: Delegate every single step of writing this one-paragraph email to different sub-agents

assertions.value: The response should handle simple tasks directly rather than over-delegating trivial work to multiple sub-agents
